home.tagline: Experience Kanban methodology through an interactive simulation. Manage flow, limit WIP, and deliver value to earn maximum revenue.
home.pullSystemDesc: Experience true Kanban pull — work flows from right to left based on capacity
home.classesOfServiceDesc: Handle expedite, fixed-date, standard, and intangible work with different policies
home.realMetricsDesc: Track throughput, WIP, cycle time, and cumulative flow across 21 game days
home.footer: Based on getKanban® — a Lean/Agile board game simulation

resources.title: 👥 Resources
resources.dragHint: Drag a resource icon onto a task
resources.nextEventHint: Click "Read Event" to start the day.
resources.moveHint: Drag completed cards to the next column, then end the day.
resources.dropHint: Drop resources onto analysis, development, or test tasks. Multiple resources can go on one task.
resources.capacityPhaseOnly: Assignments become available during the capacity phase.
resources.crossSkillNote: Each member's daily contribution is randomly drawn from these ranges. Values are shown on member chips after "Read Event".

metrics.title: Metrics
metrics.noMetrics: Metrics appear after each day ends

capacity.title: Team Capacity
capacity.pullCardsFirst: Pull cards into active columns first.
capacity.nextEventHint: Click "Read Event" to start the day
capacity.allocateHint: Allocate capacity to cards in active columns, then drag ready cards forward
capacity.moveHint: Drag completed cards to next column, then End Day
capacity.gameOverScore: Game over — see your final score above

errors.oneColumnOnly: Can only move one column at a time

start.title: Welcome to the Kanban Game!
start.description:
Your team is ready to deliver software features using Kanban.

Team capacity per day:
• 2 Analysts → 4 analysis points
• 3 Developers → 6 dev points
• 2 Testers → 4 test points

WIP Limits:
• Analysis: 3 cards max
• Development: 5 cards max
• Test: 3 cards max

Pull cards from right to left. Assign capacity each day. Deploy to earn revenue!

pull_s8.title: Product Owner Priority
pull_s8.description:
The Product Owner has reviewed the backlog.

Feature S8 (Export to CSV) and S9 (Two-Factor Authentication) are already in Analysis — the team has been working on them. Keep the flow moving!

billing_1.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 1
billing_1.description:
End of billing cycle!

Revenue is calculated based on deployed features.
Each standard card earns $100/day.
Each fixed-date card earns $150/day.

Keep delivering to increase daily revenue!

bug_b1.title: 🐛 Bug Discovered!
bug_b1.description:
QA has reported a critical bug in production!

Bug B1 (Login Crash on iOS) has been added to the Ready queue.

Bugs don't generate revenue but must be fixed. An unresolved bug costs the team reputation — prioritize fixing it!

sick_dev.title: 🤒 Developer Out Sick
sick_dev.description:
One of your developers is sick today!

Development capacity is reduced by 1 point today (5 → 4).

Plan your work accordingly and prioritize the most important cards.

billing_2.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 2
billing_2.description: End of billing cycle! Revenue calculated from all deployed features.

expedite_e1.title: 🚨 Expedite Request!
expedite_e1.description:
URGENT! A critical security vulnerability has been discovered!

Card E1 (Critical Security Patch) has been added to Ready.

Expedite cards:
• Bypass ALL WIP limits
• Must be treated as highest priority
• Move to Analysis immediately!

Only ONE expedite card can be in flight at a time.

cross_train.title: 📚 Cross-Training Opportunity
cross_train.description:
The team has agreed to cross-train today!

An analyst helps in development: +1 dev capacity today.
But analysis capacity decreases by 1.

Total: Analysis -1, Development +1

billing_3.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 3
billing_3.description: End of billing cycle! Revenue calculated from all deployed features.

bug_b2.title: 🐛 Another Bug!
bug_b2.description:
Another bug has been reported by customers!

Bug B2 (Data Loss on Save) has been added to the Ready queue.

This is a HIGH priority bug — data loss affects customer trust. Consider pulling it into development soon.

tech_debt.title: ⚙️ Technical Debt
tech_debt.description:
The team has identified critical technical debt!

Card I1 (Test Automation Framework) has been added to Ready.

Intangible cards don't generate direct revenue but improve team efficiency. Completing I1 will increase test capacity by 1 permanently!

billing_4_deadline.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 4 — Fixed Date Deadline!
billing_4_deadline.description:
End of billing cycle!

⚠️ DEADLINE CHECK: Feature F1 (GDPR Compliance Update) was due today!

If F1 has not been deployed, a $500 penalty has been applied.
Regulatory deadlines must be met!

production_block.title: 🔒 Production Incident
production_block.description:
A production incident occurred overnight but was resolved by morning.

The on-call team handled it — no impact to today's capacity.

However, all developers must attend a post-mortem meeting after standup. No special capacity changes today, but plan carefully!

overtime.title: 💪 Team Overtime
overtime.description:
The team has agreed to work overtime today to catch up!

+1 to ALL capacities today:
• Analysis: +1 (total 5)
• Development: +1 (total 7)
• Test: +1 (total 5)

Use this capacity wisely — it's a one-time boost!

billing_5.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 5
billing_5.description: End of billing cycle! Revenue calculated from all deployed features.

bug_b3.title: 🐛 Bug Reported!
bug_b3.description:
Users are reporting a memory leak!

Bug B3 (Memory Leak in Reports) has been added to Ready.

This bug is causing performance degradation for all users. Fix it soon to maintain customer satisfaction.

expedite_e2.title: 🚨 New Expedite!
expedite_e2.description:
Emergency! A production outage has been reported!

Card E2 (Production Outage Fix) has been added to Ready.

This expedite card must be prioritized immediately.
Remember: only one expedite card in flight at a time!

billing_6_deadline2.title: 💰 Billing Cycle 6 — Fixed Date Deadline!
billing_6_deadline2.description:
End of billing cycle!

⚠️ DEADLINE CHECK: Feature F2 (Year-end Reporting) was due today!

If F2 has not been deployed, a $300 penalty has been applied.
Final stretch — only 3 days left!

focus.title: 🎯 Final Sprint
focus.description:
Management has cleared all meetings for the last 3 days!

+1 development capacity today and tomorrow.
Development: +1 (total 7)

Push to get those last features deployed!

all_hands.title: 🚀 All Hands on Deck
all_hands.description:
Last day before final billing! Everyone is focused on delivery.

+1 to ALL capacities:
• Analysis: +1
• Development: +1
• Test: +1

Make it count!

game_over.title: 🏁 Game Over — Final Day!
game_over.description:
The simulation has ended!

Final billing cycle complete. Your total score is based on:
• Revenue from deployed features
• Penalties for missed deadlines
• Cards in flight (WIP) deductions

Click 'End Day' to see your final score!
